name: @elvis1513/auto-coding-skill
description: CLI installer for project-owned engineering constitution, environment, and change-record documentation.

scripts.test: node -c cli/src/index.js && node -c cli/src/sync-assets.js && node -c cli/tests/index.test.js && node cli/tests/index.test.js
scripts.test:src: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const file of ['src/auto-coding-skill/SKILL.md','src/auto-coding-skill/data/templates/ENVIRONMENT.md','src/auto-coding-skill/data/templates/PROJECT.md','src/auto-coding-skill/data/templates/architecture/.gitkeep','src/auto-coding-skill/data/templates/product/.gitkeep','src/auto-coding-skill/data/templates/bridges/AGENTS.md']) if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error('missing '+file); console.log('source-doc-assets-ok')"
scripts.release:check: npm run check:assets && npm run test:src && npm run test && npm run check:package
